title: Linear-Time String Search and Prefix Structure · Structure Brief: Prefix Function
summary: Scan large logs for many repeated patterns without repeated restart work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 prefix function increment in a verified prefix-based matching engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compute prefix-function fallback lengths while preserving matched-prefix meaning.
Measure expanded nodes, pruned reasons, depth, and incumbent improvements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
